message:
fix(web): prevent stale async results in phage selection

Added request token pattern to loadPhage() to guard against race
conditions when rapidly switching phages. Each load request now has
a unique ID, and state updates are only applied if the request ID
still matches the current one.

This prevents:
- Stale phage data overwriting newer selections
- Sequence data from old selections appearing for new ones
- Incorrect loading states when requests overlap
- Error messages from superseded requests

Fixes: phage_explorer-s4qx.6.2.1
